## Executive Summary

The VOX 6-Layer Integrated Grading Pipeline has analyzed all portfolio positions and watchlist tickers. **No tickers currently qualify as STRONG_BUY (grade ≥ 90) or BUY (grade ≥ 75)**. The market environment is characterized by mixed macro signals — a normalizing yield curve supports financials, but dollar strengthening and elevated oil prices create headwinds for emerging markets and consumer discretionary. Weather-related disruptions (flooding in TX/MO/OK) are impacting materials, insurance, and transportation sectors.

**Top 3 Recommendations** are all **HOLD-grade** positions that represent the highest-quality holdings in the portfolio — these are the names to accumulate on weakness rather than sell.
